blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,146 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 15".
